---
layout: default
title: Data Management
---

This will have introduction information about the page and the data management steps
## Before the survey
### Getting the CLAMS database ready

## During the survey
### Completing an operation

### Initial QAQC of raw data

### Data flow diagram

## After the survey
### Additions to the data
* Ages
* Diets

### Archiving the data in staging

### Moving data to production

### Clearing out staging
